'''Dahl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Samarian]] who served as an aide to [[Aaren Larker]], a liaison to the Samarian resistance in the time immediately after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]' end.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
